  1. org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.chat.cache.semantic
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.client
Chat client API.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor
Provides classes for advising chat clients.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api
Provides the API for chat client advisors.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.toolsearch
Tool Search Tool Advisor package for dynamic tool discovery and search capabilities.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore
Spring AI chat client advisors package.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.observation
Provides classes for observing chat data.
org.springframework.ai.rag.advisor
 
org.springframework.ai.test.chat.client.advisor
Test support classes for ChatClient advisor integration tests.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api used by org.springframework.ai.chat.cache.semantic
    Class
    Description
    Advisor
    Parent advisor interface for all advisors.
    AdvisorChain
    Defines the context for executing a chain of advisors as part of processing a chat request.
    BaseAdvisor
    Base advisor that implements common aspects of the CallAdvisor and StreamAdvisor, reducing the boilerplate code needed to implement an advisor.
    BaseChatMemoryAdvisor
    Base interface for chat memory advisors.
    CallAdvisor
    Advisor for execution flows ultimately resulting in a call to an AI model
    CallAdvisorChain
    A chain of CallAdvisor instances orchestrating the execution of a ChatClientRequest on the next CallAdvisor in the chain.
    MemoryAdvisor
    Marker interface for advisors that own the memory lifecycle.
    StreamAdvisor
    Advisor for execution flows ultimately resulting in a streaming call to an AI model.
    StreamAdvisorChain
    A chain of StreamAdvisor instances orchestrating the execution of a ChatClientRequest on the next StreamAdvisor in the chain.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api used by org.springframework.ai.chat.client
    Class
    Description
    Advisor
    Parent advisor interface for all advisors.
    BaseAdvisorChain
    A base interface for advisor chains that can be used to chain multiple advisors together, both for call and stream advisors.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api used by org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor
    Class
    Description
    Advisor
    Parent advisor interface for all advisors.
    AdvisorChain
    Defines the context for executing a chain of advisors as part of processing a chat request.
    BaseAdvisor
    Base advisor that implements common aspects of the CallAdvisor and StreamAdvisor, reducing the boilerplate code needed to implement an advisor.
    BaseAdvisorChain
    A base interface for advisor chains that can be used to chain multiple advisors together, both for call and stream advisors.
    BaseAdvisorChain.Builder
    Builder for creating a BaseAdvisorChain instance.
    BaseChatMemoryAdvisor
    Base interface for chat memory advisors.
    CallAdvisor
    Advisor for execution flows ultimately resulting in a call to an AI model
    CallAdvisorChain
    A chain of CallAdvisor instances orchestrating the execution of a ChatClientRequest on the next CallAdvisor in the chain.
    MemoryAdvisor
    Marker interface for advisors that own the memory lifecycle.
    StreamAdvisor
    Advisor for execution flows ultimately resulting in a streaming call to an AI model.
    StreamAdvisorChain
    A chain of StreamAdvisor instances orchestrating the execution of a ChatClientRequest on the next StreamAdvisor in the chain.
    ToolAdvisor
    Marker interface for advisors that own the tool-call lifecycle.

    Description
    Advisor
    Parent advisor interface for all advisors.

    Base advisor that implements common aspects of the CallAdvisor and StreamAdvisor, reducing the boilerplate code needed to implement an advisor.
    BaseAdvisorChain
    A base interface for advisor chains that can be used to chain multiple advisors together, both for call and stream advisors.

    Builder for creating a BaseAdvisorChain instance.

    A chain of CallAdvisor instances orchestrating the execution of a ChatClientRequest on the next CallAdvisor in the chain.

    A chain of StreamAdvisor instances orchestrating the execution of a ChatClientRequest on the next StreamAdvisor in the chain.
